content.en:
Rumble!

The inheritance content of the immeasurable supernatural power of the ten-armed golden body was integrated into Ye Tian's will.

Gradually, he learned all about the cultivation content of the ten-armed golden body.

According to the lineage, the ten-armed golden body involves ten immeasurable bones, and the position of these ten immeasurable bones is fixed and must reach super-high quality.

And Ye Tian's whole body has reached the super-grade quality, so he naturally meets this requirement.

For Ye Tian, the only thing he lacked at the moment was the materials needed to cultivate the ten-armed golden body.

Ye Tian took a look, a total of ten materials were needed, each of which was extremely precious, and one of the materials was Tongtian True Gold.

The value of Tongtian gold is so precious that it is only one of the materials here.

"I don't have any other materials except for the innocent gold!"

Ye Tian felt that he would definitely not be able to trade these materials at the moment, because the value of these materials was no less than Tongtian True Gold, and the Xuanqi Realm would definitely not be able to find them.

Therefore, he temporarily gave up cultivating the ten-armed golden body, and waited for the opportunity to talk about it in the future.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian mainly carried out full-body tempering, striving to improve his cultivation to the level of more than nine full-body tempering.

With his current cultivation, every time he refines his whole body, his strength will skyrocket.

Time flies, and another long time has passed.

Ye Tian consumed a lot of immeasurable blood gold stones, and finally completed another full-body tempering.

At this time, he had already completed six full-body tempering, and his strength had skyrocketed.

However, it was a little difficult to complete the seventh full-body tempering in a short period of time.

"I'll have to rely on the blue wolf in the Evil Blue Land to replicate my body!"

After Ye Tian came out of the Evil Blue Land, the dark blue wolf copy body stayed there, and he was also worried that the Heavenly Ancestors would explore the Evil Blue Land, so the copy body had been cultivating and had not broken in.

He didn't reproduce his real body in the Blue Land, just because he was afraid of being discovered.

But for such a long time, there has been no movement in the Evil Blue Land, and the entire Evil Blue Land seems to have been blocked by the Heavenly Ancestors, just waiting for the next opening.

So, he can carry out his plan.

The Evil Blue Lands.

A huge dark blue wolf came out of the depths of the earth, and the incomparably powerful aura announced that it had broken through to the fourth stage.

This is Ye Tian's blue wolf copy body, after all these years, relying on himself to step into the fourth stage, in terms of strength, it is naturally not as good as the real body copy body, but the combat power is also very strong.

It's just that if you want to collect a lot of resources from the Evil Blue Land, you have to rely on Ye Tian's true body to copy your body.

"Copy!"

It didn't take long for Ye Tian's true body copy body to be copied out, hidden in the body of the Blue Wolf copy body.

"Let's go, find resources!"

Ye Tian shuttled through the Evil Blue Land as a dark blue wolf, looking for resources that would help him a lot.

I have to say that there are really a lot of resources in the Evil Blue Land, even after being scraped by many fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms last time, there are still a lot of resources now.

Some of these resources are of good value, and they are all useful for the fifth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Ye Tian used the blue wolf to copy the body to scrape a lot of resources, if he encountered a creature that he couldn't deal with, then the real body copy the body to attack.

With the strength of replicating his body in his true body, there are few creatures in the Evil Blue Land that can match him.

this day.

Ye Tian found an immeasurable blood spirit tree again, and it was larger and more powerful than the last time he found it, so the quality of the immeasurable blood spirit liquid it extracted would also be higher.

"Nice catch!"

After Ye Tian killed the creature guarding this immeasurable blood spirit tree, he took this immeasurable blood spirit tree and took a little time to extract the immeasurable blood spirit liquid.

In the following years, Ye Tian found a lot of immeasurable blood spirit trees, some of which were very hidden, but they were still discovered by him.

At the same time, a large number of other resources also fell into Ye Tian's hands.

"With the immeasurable blood spiritual fluid I have obtained now and other resources that can help with whole-body refining, it should be enough to raise my cultivation to the level of seven whole-body refining!"

Subsequently.

Ye Tian found a place in the Evil Blue Land and began to retreat and practice here.

After all, the Evil Blue Land was blocked, and there was no way for his copy body to leave the Evil Blue Land, even if he brought Dunjia Suo, it would attract the attention of the Heavenly Ancestors.

So, he simply went into retreat here.

Airplanes!!!

A large amount of immeasurable blood spirit liquid was taken out by Ye Tian and turned into a pool of immeasurable blood spirit liquid.

Then, he put a lot of other resource materials and integrated them into the immeasurable blood spirit liquid pool one by one.

Then, he submerged his body into the immeasurable pool of blood and spiritual fluid, and began to absorb the energy in it, refining his whole body.

Rumble!!!!

A large amount of pure energy poured into Ye Tian's body, constantly refining his whole body, making Ye Tian's body stronger and stronger.

As time passed, Ye Tian was getting closer and closer to the seventh full-body refinement, and the energy in the pool was also rapidly depleting.

In the blink of an eye, Ye Tian had been cultivating here for millions of years.

At this point, the pool is about to be depleted.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body began to transform, and he was finally about to complete the seventh full-body tempering, and his body also ushered in a great transformation.

After a long time, the transformation of his body was over, and he had already become a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that had been tempered seven times, and his strength had improved much more than before.

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

With his foundation, from the sixth full-body tempering to the seventh full-body tempering, the increase in strength far exceeded that of other great ancestors.

Of course, the resources he needs are unimaginable!

However, just as he broke through, it seemed to cause some of the rules of the Evil Blue Lands to change.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian had no other thoughts, and directly annihilated this true body copy body, erasing all traces of himself.

The next moment.

One terrifying will descended here, probing many territories one by one, and then locked Ye Tian's evil blue wolf copy body.

"Exposed!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

The next moment, a finger poked out of the void and pressed a finger against his dark blue wolf replica body.

Then, the copy of the blue wolf turned into ashes.

After killing Ye Tian's blue wolf copy body, several voices chatted in the void.

"The Evil Blue Land has mixed in with a Great Ancestor, and that Great Ancestor ran very fast and fled in a way that we don't even understand. That dark blue wolf was probably subdued by him, so he could only kill it!"

"That Great Ancestor's cultivation doesn't even seem to be in the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable life form realm, but his strength is very strong, is it a disciple of the Heavenly Ancestor?"

"No matter whose disciple it is, but the Evil Blue Land is a treasure land we have discovered, it is used for entertainment, and it is a bit too much to send a disciple to come over to collect resources!"

"Forget it, it's good to play in a different place next time!"

Immediately, these Heavenly Ancestors left one by one.
